jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Craftsvilla
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Craftsvilla! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
